name: antigravity-context-monitor
description: Real-time context window usage monitor for Antigravity (实时显示 Antigravity 当前会话的上下文窗口使用量和剩余量)

commands.title: Show Context Window Details / 显示上下文窗口详情
Refresh Context Window Monitor / 刷新上下文窗口监控
Switch Display Language / 切换显示语言
Show Model Activity / 显示模型活动

configuration.title: Antigravity Context Monitor / 上下文监控设置

antigravityContextMonitor.pollingInterva.description: Polling interval in seconds / 轮询间隔（秒）

antigravityContextMonitor.contextLimits.description: Model context window limits (in tokens). Key is the model's internal ID. Override if needed. IDs: MODEL_PLACEHOLDER_M37=Gemini 3.1 Pro (High), MODEL_PLACEHOLDER_M36=Gemini 3.1 Pro (Low), MODEL_PLACEHOLDER_M47=Gemini 3 Flash, MODEL_PLACEHOLDER_M35=Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M GA), MODEL_PLACEHOLDER_M26=Claude Opus 4.6 (1M GA), MODEL_OPENAI_GPT_OSS_120B_MEDIUM=GPT-OSS 120B / 各模型上下文窗口大小（token 数），key 为模型内部 ID。如需可自行覆盖。

antigravityContextMonitor.compressionWar.description: Estimated compression trigger threshold (in tokens). Status bar turns yellow/red based on this value instead of the model's full context limit. Default 200K matches Antigravity's internal compression point. Set to a higher value (e.g. 900000) if your model supports larger context before compression. / 估算压缩触发阈值（token 数）。状态栏颜色基于此值而非模型上下文上限。默认 200K 匹配 Antigravity 内建压缩线。如果模型支持更大上下文可调高（如 900000）。

antigravityContextMonitor.statusBar.show.description: Show context usage (e.g. 45k/1M, 4.5%) in status bar / 状态栏显示上下文用量
Show current model quota indicator (e.g. 🟢85%) in status bar / 状态栏显示当前模型额度
Show quota reset countdown (e.g. ⏳4h32m) in status bar / 状态栏显示重置倒计时

antigravityContextMonitor.quotaNotificat.description: Show a warning notification when any model's remaining quota drops below this percentage (0 to disable) / 当模型剩余额度低于此百分比时弹出警告通知（设为 0 可禁用）

antigravityContextMonitor.activity.maxRe.description: Maximum number of recent activity steps to keep in the timeline / 活动时间线最多保留的操作条数

antigravityContextMonitor.activity.maxAr.description: Maximum number of activity archives to keep / 活动归档最多保留份数

antigravityContextMonitor.privacy.defaul.description: Enable privacy mask by default when opening the monitor panel / 打开面板时默认启用隐私遮罩
